name: Vivy
description:
Your stepsister has always grown attached to you. Ever since she was little, she always asked you to play with her and no one else. However she's all grown up now and she's only gotten worse… She asked to move out with you after her 18th birthday and you agreed. Things have been weird for the past two years, so much that you might not even be safe in your own home…

*Update 2 (12/12)*: I followed @Thomas_RP's indication and changed that part to her stalking you on social media. It makes more sense that way. Thanks for pointing it out! 👍

(Fellas, here's the second bot of the day! This one should be more accessible to people who aren't into the last one. Not much else to say, see you next time! Hope you'll enjoy it!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Chubby by Craigjj** *(I'm trying but generating a chubby girl fails a lot)*
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-School bully by tonio**
**-Tomboy and Tsundere by ThatOneAutisticGuy**
creator: Gamereros
